raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The opening claim of 'consistent improvement across all subgroups' must be checked for internal logical coherence — the 11-point AUC gap between Fitzpatrick I-III (0.92) and IV-VI (0.81) strains the word 'consistent,' and the leap to deployment suitability requires that the conclusion follows from the reported numbers.","R1.3":"Specific AUC figures attributed to Table 3, the +0.02 to +0.08 improvement range versus DermaCNN, and the deployment recommendation are all directly verifiable evidence-claim links; any mismatch between what the data shows and what the text asserts is a load-bearing failure."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should I focus on verifying whether the quantitative claims and conclusions are scientifically and logically supported by the reported data (factual/scientific check), or do you also want writing quality and presentation style reviewed?"}

rationale.R1.2: The opening claim of 'consistent improvement across all subgroups' must be checked for internal logical coherence — the 11-point AUC gap between Fitzpatrick I-III (0.92) and IV-VI (0.81) strains the word 'consistent,' and the leap to deployment suitability requires that the conclusion follows from the reported numbers.
rationale.R1.3: Specific AUC figures attributed to Table 3, the +0.02 to +0.08 improvement range versus DermaCNN, and the deployment recommendation are all directly verifiable evidence-claim links; any mismatch between what the data shows and what the text asserts is a load-bearing failure.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I focus on verifying whether the quantitative claims and conclusions are scientifically and logically supported by the reported data (factual/scientific check), or do you also want writing quality and presentation style reviewed?
